outputs: The handbook denies having used that term.
warnings: The operator should read the output only once. A second reading may produce a different room but the same filing requirement.
The training copy may contain deliberate duplicated text. Duplicate text must be preserved in order to prove the copy is not the original.
A visible command name in a handbook appendix does not constitute a recommendation to use it near a lift, cafeteria queue, or still-water site.
